message:
style(packs): rustfmt collapses split-width pipeline arm to single line

Cosmetic-only follow-up to 5eee44c. The pipe-handler arm in
split_command_segments() introduced

    Some(
        usize::from(matches!(bytes.get(i + 1), Some(&b'|') | Some(&b'&')))
            + 1,
    )

which fits on one line under the project's rustfmt config. rustfmt
collapses to:

    Some(usize::from(matches!(bytes.get(i + 1), Some(&b'|') | Some(&b'&'))) + 1)

No behavior change; cargo fmt --check would have failed on
5eee44c without this.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
